style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An allegorical four-headed sea serpent rising from stormy waters, each of its four heads distinct in character, faced by a single resolute figure standing on a ship's deck holding navigational instruments rather than a weapon. The four hydras are labelled « Dette technique », « Cyberrisque », « Demande croissante », « Déficits ». Tense but composed. Don't include a legend or other clutter. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An allegorical four-headed sea serpent rising from stormy waters, each of its four heads distinct in character, faced by a single resolute figure standing on a ship's deck holding navigational instruments rather than a weapon. The four hydras are labelled « Dette technique », « Cyberrisque », « Demande croissante », « Déficits ». Tense but composed. Don't include a legend or other clutter. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
